next_atomic_step: mirror expected live contract and checks onto API-key next action summaries
required_commands: POLYGON_API_KEY=fake FRED_API_KEY=fake NEWS_API_KEY=fake PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m halo_swing_mcp.harness run_api_key_pipeline_smoke --input-json '{"asset":"TQQQ","timeframe":"swing_3d_10d","symbols":["QQQ"],"topic":"macro","summary_only":true}' --no-audit

POLYGON_API_KEY=fake FRED_API_KEY=fake NEWS_API_KEY=fake PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -c 'from halo_swing_mcp.tools.readiness import run_api_key_pipeline_smoke; payload=run_api_key_pipeline_smoke(summary_only=True); print(payload["next_operator_action_expected_live_contract"], ",".join(payload["next_operator_action_expected_live_checks"]), payload["api_key_next_action_summary"]["next_action_expected_live_contract"], payload["secret_values_returned"])'
